name: higgesfield
description: Adobe Premiere Pro CEP plugin: consistent character / background / SFX generation + auto-cut, talking directly to model APIs (no broker).

scripts.zxp: echo Sign with ZXPSignCmd to package a .zxp (see README.md)

engines.note: Runs inside Premiere's bundled CEP Node runtime. No npm install required — only Node built-ins (https, fs, crypto, child_process) are used.
